summary: Strong implementation with proper error handling, type hints, and GitHub Actions conventions. Pinned action versions, least-privilege permissions, and set -euo pipefail present. Minor issues: workflow depends on external setup (changed_files.txt, rules.json not created within pipeline—requires harness to provide); 'Show changed files' step (line 44-47) is purely informational. Hand-written glob-to-regex conversion in _glob_to_regex() is complex but well-documented. Conflict resolution and priority ordering algorithms are sound. Code is idiomatic Python with clear separation of concerns.
